skill1.kitLine: Activates only when in Focusing status. Affects all allies. / Focuses fire continuously.
skill1.note: No numeric effect; targeting/taunt behavior inert for damage sim. Skipped per note.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when Full Burst ends. Affects all allies. Cooldown of Burst Skill ▼ 7.48 sec.
skill1.where: skill1[0] trigger fullBurstEnd → burstCdr 7.48, target allies

skill1.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects all allies. Attack Damage ▲ 4% for 10 sec.
skill1.where: skill1[1] trigger fullBurstEnter → buff attackDamagePct 4 / 10s, target allies

skill1.kitLine: Activates each time total ammo expended by allies reaches 400. Affects all allies. Fills Burst Gauge by 37%.
skill1.where: skill1[2] trigger teamAmmo count 400 → fillGauge 37, target allies
skill1.note: Q6 update: now fires on TEAM ammo via teamAmmo trigger (was self-hitCount proxy that underfilled). Burst-cadence effect, not her own damage.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when the enemy appears. Affects the target. Bubble: Damage Taken ▲ 5.05% continuously.
skill2.where: skill2[0] trigger passive → buff damageTakenPct 5.05, target enemy
skill2.note: Modeled as permanent passive enemy debuff.

skill2.kitLine: Activates after landing 50 normal attacks (target in Bubble). Explosive Bubble: Damage Taken ▲ 5.05% continuously. Stuns 3 sec. Removes Bubble.
skill2.note: Author ruling: relocates the same 5.05% debuff, does NOT stack to 10.1%; stun skipped (boss doesn't act). DISPUTED by kit-status F1 / caveat — possible 10.1% steady-state, needs measurement.

skill2.kitLine: Activates every 1 sec only during Full Burst. Affects random enemy units. Deals 63.36% of final ATK as damage. Attacks sequentially 4 times.
skill2.where: skill2[1] trigger fullBurstEnter → dot atkPct 253.44 / 10s / interval 1s, noRange, target enemy
skill2.note: 63.36%x4 = 253.44%/s as 10s DoT. Video-confirmed: ticks get +50% FB (noFb removed), all 4 sub-hits land on single boss. Assumes nominal 10s FB window.

skill2.kitLine: Activates each time total ammo expended by allies reaches 500. Affects random enemy units. Bubble Barrage: Deals 85% of final ATK as damage. Attacks sequentially 10 times.
skill2.where: skill2[2] trigger teamAmmo count 500 → flatDamage atkPct 850, noRange, target enemy
skill2.note: 85x10 = 850% per hit (user-confirmed per-hit). Q6: fires on TEAM ammo via teamAmmo (was self-hitCount undercount). core:false / flatDamage default (user-confirmed).

burst.kitLine: Affects all allies. Attack damage ▲ 10.13% for 10 sec. Reloads 33.26% magazine(s).
burst.where: burst[0] trigger burstCast → buff attackDamagePct 10.13 / 10s + instantReload 0.3326, target allies
burst.note: Parser-materialized (offline parser), not hand-verified but behavior-identical.

burst.kitLine: Affects self. ATK ▲ 17.28% of the skill user's ATK for 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[1] trigger burstCast → buff casterAtkPct 17.28 / 10s, target self
burst.note: skill-user's-ATK → casterAtkPct via upgraded offline parser; not hand-verified.

documentedConfounds.text: Explosive Bubble may stack with Bubble to 10.1% team damage-taken vs modeled 5.05% — unverified, needs in-game debuff-icon/popup measurement.
documentedConfounds.why: An under-modeled damage-taken makes sim team damage too LOW (COLD direction), opposite the observed HOT (ratio 1.097). Cannot cause the HOT gap; resolving it would INCREASE sim damage and worsen the HOT over-prediction.

documentedConfounds.text: FB nuke encoded as 10s DoT started at FB entry; tick count assumes nominal 10s FB window, doesn't track shortened/extended FB.
documentedConfounds.why: Investigated and ruled out by 2026-07-15 video re-read: DoT ticks confirmed +50% FB and all 4 sub-hits land on single boss; residual over traced to SMG normals, not the DoT.
No numeric damage effect; targeting/taunt behavior inert in partless-boss sim.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2 Explosive Bubble (after 50 normals): 5.05% debuff + 3s stun + removes Bubble.
documentedConfounds.why: Author ruling: relocates (not stacks) the existing 5.05% debuff; stun inert on partless boss. The stacking question is the same as caveat F1 (opposite-sign to HOT).

documentedConfounds.text: OPEN residual ~22% HOT over lives in SMG NORMALS — flat SMG core-rate over-count off-optimal-range; to be fixed by the range-dependent core model (Chisato SMG recording), not an LM-specific change.
documentedConfounds.why: This is the author's identified cause of the current HOT gap: teammates Crown/Helm/SW match ~1.0 while only LM's normals overshoot; per-hit coefficients video-confirmed correct, so excess is in normal-fire uptime/range.

documentedConfounds.text: U13 DoT-crit: DoT sub-hits crit in-game (measured orange 450,314 = 337,736 × 1.333) but sim models DoT without crit (DOT_CRIT off) → ~7.5% DoT under-count.
documentedConfounds.why: Under-count pushes COLD, partially offsetting the HOT over; opposite sign. Gated on a global panel/Fable decision affecting ALL DoTs — must not be flipped in isolation (would worsen LM's normal-driven over).

authorIntentSummary: The override models Little Mermaid as a Burst-I Wind supporter: skill1 recovers the parser-dropped team burst-CDR (7.48s on FB end), team Attack Damage 4%/10s (on FB enter), and 37% gauge fill per 400 TEAM ammo (teamAmmo trigger); skill2 carries a permanent 5.05% enemy damage-taken debuff (Bubble), a 253.44%/s ×10s Full-Burst DoT (63.36%×4, video-confirmed to get +50% FB and land all 4 sub-hits on the single boss), and an 850% Bubble Barrage per 500 team ammo; burst is parser-materialized (team Attack Damage 10.13%/10s + 33.26% reload, self casterAtkPct 17.28%/10s). Key approximations: Explosive Bubble is intentionally NOT added as a second damage-taken stack (author rules it a relocation, not 10.1%) though kit-status F1 disputes this pending measurement, and the FB DoT assumes a nominal 10s window. The known-not-faithful spot is the ~22% HOT over-prediction (ratio 1.097, n=4), which the author traced to SMG normal-fire core-rate over-count off-optimal-range — to be fixed by the global range-dependent core model, not an LM-specific change; a secondary U13 DoT-crit under-count (~7.5%) is held pending a global DoT-crit decision.
